channel.title: Ninad Pathak
channel.description: Programmer-turned-writer helping DevTools and SaaS companies create technical content their engineering teams actually approve.

item.title: Agent harnesses: the infrastructure layer your LLM agent actually needs
item.description: Every production AI agent needs a harness. Here's what one contains, why frameworks often aren't enough, and how to build the layer that actually determines reliability.

item.title: Best LLMs for coding in 2026 (it's not what benchmarks say)
item.description: HumanEval scores are nearly meaningless in 2026. Here's how to pick the right coding LLM based on your actual task — agentic coding, autocomplete, or cost-sensitive production.
